headlines.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq soar on US-Iran pact to reopen Hormuz
Bitcoin recovers to $66,000, but one analyst warns of a 'dead-cat bounce'
Nvidia joins Wall Street's AI funding wave
Stock Market Today: Dow Jumps As Trump Makes This Iran Move; AI Player, Airline Fly Past Entries (Live Coverage)
Dow Jones Stocks: Honeywell Aerospace Looms As GE Stock Breaks Out
Crypto mutiny on Strategy: Shorts target 'MSTR' in bitcoin bloodbath
headlines.desc: Flows around Strategy (MSTR) and the company's variable-rate preferred stock STRC are turning bearish this week.

headlines.title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
headlines.desc: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

headlines.title: Chip rebound sparks hedging flurry from traders
headlines.desc: Despite the overall bearish sentiment on the cohort, traders put a few bullish bets on potential semiconductor winners.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
headlines.desc: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.

headlines.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
headlines.desc: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.

headlines.title: US says Iran signed deal to end war, ships moving through Strait of Hormuz
headlines.desc: Iran has not confirmed Trump admin claim both sides have 'digitally' signed initial deal, which has not been released.

headlines.title: Is Lebanon included? Country hopeful for US-Iran ceasefire, despite doubts
headlines.desc: Ceasefire raises hopes in Lebanon, yet Israeli defiance and past violations overshadow lasting peace.

headlines.title: Even Nvidia is joining the AI borrowing spree, with a historic $20 billion bond deal
headlines.desc: Nvidia is launching a seven-tranche debt offering to refinance its existing debt, as investor appetite for AI credit surges.

headlines.title: Here are 20 growth stocks you can buy at ‘value’ prices
headlines.desc: These stocks trade at or lower than half the P/E valuation of the S&P 500, while having much higher projected revenue growth rates than that of the index.

headlines.title: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says
headlines.desc: Sent to the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, incoming Chair Kevin Warsh instead may have to push for higher levels.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.desc: Investors seeking steady income can bolster their portfolios by adding dividend stocks with attractive yields.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about the growth prospects of these 3 stocks
headlines.desc: Continued volatility presents an opportunity to find stocks trading at attractive prices and benefit from their long-term growth potential.

headlines.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
headlines.desc: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

headlines.title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
headlines.desc: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

headlines.title: Avalanche Treasury Co set to start trading on Nasdaq as crypto proxy trade evolves
headlines.desc: Avalanche is a six-year-old blockchain built for business that counts BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and Apollo among its users.

headlines.title: What energy insiders in DC are saying about oil prices and a possible Iran deal
headlines.desc: Brian Sullivan shares his insight from the sidelines of the Global Energy Forum in Washington, DC.

headlines.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
headlines.desc: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.

headlines.title: Bitcoin's brutal sell-off sparks a flurry of trading in related stocks, including one big bullish bet
headlines.desc: The year has been a rocky one for the flagship cryptocurrency, but traders aren't backing away from the space.

headlines.title: The May inflation numbers are due out Wednesday morning. Here's what to expect
headlines.desc: If the Wall Street consensus is correct, the consumer price index is expected to show inflation running at a 4.2% annual rate.

headlines.title: Kalshi rolls out whistleblower services, employment verification to curb insider trading
headlines.desc: The platform will require traders to disclose their employer's identity when trading on sensitive markets, a Wall Street Journal article first reported.

headlines.title: Kevin Warsh to be sworn in as Federal Reserve chair on Friday
headlines.desc: Trump will swear in Kevin Warsh, his hand-picked choice to lead the Federal Reserve, during a White House ceremony.

headlines.title: Consumer prices rose 4.2% annually in May, highest in three years
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to show a 4.2% gain from a year ago, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.

headlines.title: SpaceX primed for double-digit pop on first day, if 'perps' trading is any guide
headlines.desc: Crypto traders are currently pricing the SpaceX pre-IPO perpetual future on Hyperliquid at $162, about 20% above the company's fixed IPO share price of $135.

headlines.title: Semiconductor shorts pile on as winning trade reverses
headlines.desc: Investors' favorite trade is suddenly the one they can't stop betting against.
